description_long: This is a beaded bracelet composed of a series of glossy, round black beads forming the main band. At the center, there is a prominent spherical bead encrusted with small, red, and white elements, giving it a textured, eye-catching appearance. Flanking the central bead are two faceted, semi-translucent beads with a marbled pattern in shades of white, gray, and black, adding visual contrast and complexity. Small, smooth white spacer beads separate the marbled beads from the main black beads. The bracelet is likely strung on an elastic or flexible cord, allowing it to stretch for easy wear. The overall design is bold and geometric, with a focus on contrasting colors and textures.
description: A bold beaded bracelet featuring glossy black beads, a central red textured bead, and marbled faceted accent beads. The design is geometric and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central red textured bead flanked by marbled faceted beads and the full arc of glossy black beads.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth and faceting of the marbled beads and the three-dimensional texture of the central bead.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the uniform row of glossy black beads, with the central bead partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the marbled beads and the arrangement of the black beads around the band.
